title: Buttery Dense Romantic Tunisian Tomato Stir-fry
description: This keto-friendly dish features tinned tomatoes and is perfect for a romantic dinner. It's baked to perfection, ensuring it's both buttery and dense.

ingredients.name: pitted prunes or apricots
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness, optional but recommended

instructions: Mix the onions with finely chopped garlic and unsalted butter in a bowl. Sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the ground meat if using, breaking it into small pieces as you stir-fry. Cook for another 2-3 minutes to seal the meat's juices.

Drain any excess liquid from the tomatoes, then add them along with prunes (if using) and coconut sugar to the onion-garlic-butter mixture in the bowl. Stir well and let it cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Transfer the mix into a greased baking dish. Sprinkle with kosher salt if desired.
Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown on top and bubbly underneath. Serve warm.
Enjoy your luxurious, buttery tomato dish that’s perfect for any romantic dinner setting.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
